summary: In the baked-image dark factory environment (no bind-mounts), `python -m alembic revision --autogenerate` fails with `OSError: [Errno 30] Read-only file system`. Workaround: (1) write the migration file manually to `/workspace/markethawk/backend/app/alembic/versions/` with the correct `revision` and `down_revision`; (2) apply the schema change via `docker compose exec backend python -c "from app.core.database import SessionLocal; from sqlalchemy import text; db=SessionLocal(); db.execute(text('ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ...')); db.execute(text(\"INSERT INTO alembic_version (version_num) VALUES ('<rev_id>') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING\")); db.commit(); db.close()"`. The workspace file will be baked into the next image build.
